title: AuthFailed still triggers reconnect via queued StreamEnded
description: Trigger: SSE server returns 401/403. run_sse_stream sends SseNotification::AuthFailed then returns; spawn_sse_task unconditionally sends SseNotification::StreamEnded after run_sse_stream returns. The main loop receives AuthFailed (no restart set, continue), then receives StreamEnded (sets sse_needs_restart=true, continue), then at loop top calls reconnect_sse and spawns a new SSE task. The new task also gets 401/403 and the cycle repeats. Bad behavior: infinite reconnect loop with exponential backoff despite intent to halt on auth failure; repeated Error + Reconnecting/Disconnected events emitted forever.
